name: clinical_trial_summary
instructions: Focus on the primary trial reported in this article. Ignore cited trials.

fields.name: Randomized Controlled Trials
fields.description: True if the study is an interventional study where participants are randomly assigned to one or more intervention groups. False if the study is theoretical with no intervention (e.g., observational, pilot, descriptive), or the study is interventional without random allocation of participants.

fields.name: Nonrandomized Interventional Study
fields.description: True if the study is an interventional study without random allocation of participants. False if the study is theoretical with no intervention (e.g., observational, pilot, descriptive), or the study is interventional with random allocation of participants to one or more intervention groups.

fields.name: Observational Study
fields.description: True if the study aims at observing outcomes without assigning interventions. False if the study is interventional or if it mixes quantitative and qualitative research methods.

fields.name: Pilot / Feasibility Study
fields.description: True if the study is a preliminary study assessing feasibility, acceptability, recruitment, or implementation before a larger trial. False if that it has not been stated explicitly.

fields.name: Mixed-Methods Study
fields.description: True if the study integrates quantitative and qualitative research methods. False if the study is either quantitative only (i.e., interventional), qualitative only (i.e., observational), or if the study is a pilot.

fields.name: Study Design sub-category
fields.description: Predominant category of Randomized Controlled Trials, Nonrandomized Intervaentional Study, Observational Study, Pilot / Feasibility Study, and Mixed-Methods Study. Populate ONLY when one of the fields 'Randomized Controlled Trials', 'Nonrandomized Intervaentional Study', 'Observational Study', 'Pilot / Feasibility Study', and 'Mixed-Methods Study' is true; otherwise return null. Choose exactly one or more of the allowed values.
enum: Descriptive / observational / prospective cohort pilot study

fields.name: number of participants
fields.description: Total number of human participants enrolled. Null if not human or not reported.

fields.name: Health Condition
fields.description: Any disease, disorder, illness, syndrome, injury, impairment, chronic condition, mental health condition, medical diagnosis, or clinically relevant health state affecting an individual or population. This includes physical, mental, neurological, infectious, developmental, metabolic, cardiovascular, respiratory, dermatological, reproductive, and age-related conditions. Return null if not reported.

fields.name: Health Condition Category
fields.description: Predominant category of Health Condition. Populate ONLY when 'Health Condition' is not null; otherwise return null. Choose exactly one of the allowed values.

fields.name: Healthcare Technology
fields.description: Technologies intended to capture, monitor, document, report, analyze, or improve patient-related health indicators, including adherence to medications, comprehension of health information, and other behavioral or clinical health factors. Return null if not reported.

fields.name: Purpose of Healthcare Technology
fields.description: Predominant category of Healthcare Technology. Populate ONLY when 'Healthcare Technology' is not null by stating the purpose of the mentioned technology; otherwise retrun null.
